zh.lifeSummary: 當Maurice FitzThomas 2nd Baron of Kerry於1260年出生在愛爾蘭蒙斯特迪 本 克里時，他的父親Sir Thomas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 1st Baron of Lixnaw and Kerry41歲，母親Grainne MacMorrogh41歲。他於大約1299年與Ellen FitzWilliam結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他於1297年登記服兵役。他去世於1305年4月14日在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里莫拉希福享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maurice FitzThomas 2nd Baron of Kerry于1260年出生在爱尔兰蒙斯特迪 本 克里时，他的父亲Sir Thomas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 1st Baron of Lixnaw and Kerry41岁，母亲Grainne MacMorrogh41岁。他于大约1299年与Ellen FitzWilliam结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他于1297年登记服兵役。他去世于1305年4月14日在爱尔兰庫迪 克里莫拉希福享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

en.lifeSummary: When Maurice FitzThomas 2nd Baron of Kerry was born in 1260, in Diocese of Kerry, Munster, Ireland, his father, Sir Thomas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 1st Baron of Lixnaw and Kerry, was 41 and his mother, Grainne MacMorrogh, was 41. He married Ellen FitzWilliam about 1299. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He registered for military service in 1297. He died on 14 April 1305, in Molahiffe, County Kerry, Ireland, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maurice FitzThomas 2nd Baron of Kerry est né en 1260, à Diocese of Kerry, Munster, Irlande, son père, Sir Thomas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 1st Baron of Lixnaw and Kerry, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Grainne MacMorrogh, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Ellen FitzWilliam environ 1299. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1297. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1305, à Molahiffe, County Kerry, Irlande, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maurice FitzThomas 2nd Baron of Kerry 1260 in Diocese of Kerry, Munster, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 1st Baron of Lixnaw and Kerry 41 und seine Mutter Grainne MacMorrogh 41. Er hat um 1299 Ellen FitzWilliam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er hat sich 1297 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 14. April 1305 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Molahiffe, County Kerry, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice FitzThomas 2nd Baron of Kerry è nato il nel 1260 nel Diocese of Kerry, Munster, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir Thomas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 1st Baron of Lixnaw and Kerry, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Grainne MacMorrogh, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Ellen FitzWilliam circa 1299. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1297. Morì il 14 aprile 1305, nel Molahiffe, County Kerry, Irlanda, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maurice FitzThomas 2nd Baron of Kerryが1260年にアイルランドムンスターディオセゼ オフ ケリーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 1st Baron of Lixnaw and Kerryは41歳，母Grainne MacMorroghは41歳であった。約1299年にEllen FitzWilliamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1297年に兵役登録をした。彼は1305年4月14日にアイルランドコウントイ ケリーモラヒフで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maurice FitzThomas 2nd Baron of Kerry(이)가 1260년 아일랜드 먼스터 디오스스 프 케리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 1st Baron of Lixnaw and Kerry(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Grainne MacMorrogh(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1299년 Ellen FitzWilliam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1297년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1305년 4월 14일 아일랜드 카운티 케리 모라히프에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice FitzThomas 2nd Baron of Kerry nasceu em 1260, em Diocese of Kerry, Munster, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Thomas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 1st Baron of Lixnaw and Kerry, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Grainne MacMorrogh, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen FitzWilliam aproximadamente 1299. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1297. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1305, em Molahiffe, County Kerry, Irlanda, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maurice FitzThomas 2nd Baron of Kerry родился в 1260 г. в местности диосес оф кирри, мунстир, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 1st Baron of Lixnaw and Kerry было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Grainne MacMorrogh, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen FitzWilliam около 1299 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. В 1297 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 14 апреля 1305 г. в местности молахифф, коунти кирри, Ирландия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maurice FitzThomas 2nd Baron of Kerry nació en 1260, en Diocese of Kerry, Munster, Irlanda, su papá, Sir Thomas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 1st Baron of Lixnaw and Kerry, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Grainne MacMorrogh, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Ellen FitzWilliam aproximadamente 1299. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1297. Murió el 14 de abril de 1305, en Molahiffe, County Kerry, Irlanda, a la edad de 45 años.
